ddls:
CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "s_suppkey" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "s_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "s_address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "s_nationkey" INTEGER /* Identifier for the nation where the supplier is located */,
  "s_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "s_acctbal" REAL /* Account balance of the supplier */,
  "s_comment" TEXT /* Comments about the supplier */,
  "s_website" TEXT /* Supplier's website URL */,
  "s_certifications" TEXT /* Supplier's certifications or compliances */,
  "s_rating" REAL /* Supplier's rating based on past performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("s_suppkey"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suppliers_s_nationkey FOREIGN KEY ("s_nationkey") REFERENCES nations ("n_nationkey")
)

CREATE TABLE "nations" (
  "n_nationkey" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nation */,
  "n_name" TEXT /* Name of the nation */,
  "n_regionkey" INTEGER /* Identifier for the region the nation belongs to */,
  "n_comment" TEXT /* Comments for additional info about the nation */,
  "n_currency" TEXT /* Currency used by the nation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("n_nationkey")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "p_productkey" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "p_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "p_supplierkey" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the product */,
  "p_category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "p_price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "p_stock" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the product */,
  "p_comment" TEXT /* Comments about the product */,
  "p_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "p_unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the product */,
  "p_lead_time" INTEGER /* Typical lead time for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("p_productkey"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_p_supplierkey FOREIGN KEY ("p_supplierkey") REFERENCES suppliers ("s_suppkey")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchase_orders" (
  "po_orderkey" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase order */,
  "po_supplierkey" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier for the order */,
  "po_orderdate" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "po_status" TEXT /* Current status of the order */,
  "po_total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "po_expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date for the order */,
  "po_payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("po_orderkey"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_po_supplierkey FOREIGN KEY ("po_supplierkey") REFERENCES suppliers ("s_suppkey")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inv_productkey" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the product in inventory */,
  "inv_quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product in stock */,
  "inv_location" TEXT /* Location where the product is stored */,
  "inv_reorderlevel" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "inv_storage_conditions" TEXT /* Required storage conditions for the product */,
  "inv_last_stock_update" TEXT /* Date of the last stock update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inv_productkey")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "inv_invoicekey" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "inv_orderkey" INTEGER /* Reference to the purchase order related to the invoice */,
  "inv_total" REAL /* Total amount of the invoice */,
  "inv_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was issued */,
  "inv_paid" INTEGER /* Indicates if the invoice has been paid */,
  "inv_payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the invoice */,
  "inv_due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the invoice */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inv_invoicekey"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_inv_orderkey FOREIGN KEY ("inv_orderkey") REFERENCES purchase_orders ("po_orderkey")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "r_regionkey" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "r_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "r_comment" TEXT /* Comments regarding the region */,
  "r_manager" TEXT /* Name of the regional manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("r_regionkey")
)

CREATE TABLE "supplier_performance" (
  "sp_performancekey" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "sp_supplierkey" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier being evaluated */,
  "sp_delivery_time" REAL /* Average delivery time in days */,
  "sp_quality_rating" INTEGER /* Quality rating from 1 to 5 */,
  "sp_comment" TEXT /* Comments regarding the supplier's performance */,
  "sp_on_time_delivery_rate" REAL /* Supplier's on-time delivery rate */,
  "sp_defect_rate" REAL /* Supplier's defect rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sp_performancekey"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supplier_performance_sp_supplierkey FOREIGN KEY ("sp_supplierkey") REFERENCES suppliers ("s_suppkey")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "ur_roleid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "ur_rolename" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "ur_description" TEXT /* Description of the role's responsibilities */,
  "ur_permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ur_roleid")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "u_userid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "u_username" TEXT /* Username for system access */,
  "u_password" TEXT /* Password for system access */,
  "u_email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "u_roleid" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "u_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "u_department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("u_userid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_u_roleid FOREIGN KEY ("u_roleid") REFERENCES user_roles ("ur_roleid")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "a_logid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "a_userid" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "a_action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "a_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action occurred */,
  "a_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("a_logid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_a_userid FOREIGN KEY ("a_userid") REFERENCES users ("u_userid")
)
